text.title: seven-performance-domains Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for seven-performance-domains as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating Communications as automatic once it is absorbed into Stakeholders.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without an explicit comms plan, communications gets under-invested and stakeholder satisfaction drops regardless of delivery quality.
